mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyhSendEmailLog :: selectById */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , tpl.template_nm AS template_nm , usr.user_nm AS user_nm , cd_sr.code_label AS result_cd_nm FROM syh_send_email_log l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_template tpl ON tpl.template_id = l.template_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_sr ON cd_sr.code_grp = 'SEND_RESULT' AND cd_sr.code_value = l.result_cd WHERE l.log_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(l.*) /* base.sy :: SyhSendEmailLog :: selectPageCount */ FROM syh_send_email_log l
